titleStmt.title: SII 9.324: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 324. (A.R. No. 207 of 1918.) ON A PILLAR IN THE FRONT MANDAPA OF THE PAMPAPATI TEMPLE AT BENNEHALLI, SAME TALUK AND DISTRICT.

summary.p: The date of the record is Piṅgala = A.D. 1197-98, amāvāse, Sōmavāra, Vitīpāta. It is not verifiable. It refers itself to the reign of the Hoysaḷa king Vīra-Ballāḷa. Uttarāka-Heggaḍe and Janayya-Heggaḍe are said to have made a grant of mūligadeṟe, taxes on artisans, looms and oil-mills, together with the kiṟukuḷa cess, for offerings to the god Virūpāksha and for feeding Brāhmans. The gift was made in the presence of the Prabhus and Gauṇḍas of Kōgaḷi-nāḍu. Uttarāka-Heggaḍe figuring here is also mentioned in No. 323 which appears to be a record of Ballāḷa II. The present inscription also may, therefore, belong to his reign.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti . śrīmatu pratāpacakrava
rtti vīrabālāḷadēvana rājya
dalu piṁgaḷasauvatsaradaṁdu Uttarākka
hegaḍeyu janayyahegaḍeyu mūligade
ṟe paṁcakarukadeṟe maggadeṟe gāṇadeṟe
samastakiṟukuḷa teṟeyārāṭa caṁḍēsvaradē
vara saṁnidhānadalu kōgaḷināḍa prabhu
gauṁḍugaḷa muṁde ta(ṁ)mma dharmmavāgi Amāvāse
sōmavāra vitīpātadaṁdu śrīviru
pākṣadēvarige lakṣagaḍugege nivēdyakke brāhma
ṇabhōjanakke dhārāpurvvaka māḍi koṭaru
Īṁti Adhikārava Āvanagi haḍadu baṁdāta
taṁna dharmmavāgiye pratipāḷisudu .
nalleṁmeya varaṇappa śrīmatu mārkaṁḍēsvara .
Digital edition of SII 9.324 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
